div.h2: Hash State Update After Block Compression (FIPS 180-4 §6.2.2 Step 4)

g.text: Depends on ALL 512 bits of block_N
H[0] += a | wraps at 2³² | no mask needed in C uint32_t
H[1] += b | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
H[2] += c | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
H[3] += d | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
H[4] += e | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
H[5] += f | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
H[6] += g | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
H[7] += h | wraps at 2³² | automatic in C
Updated State: carries ALL prior blocks' influence
Total: 32 bytes — final digest if last block
Block 0 | sha256_compress(H, block[0]) | H updated in place
Block 1 | sha256_compress(H, block[1]) | starts from updated H
Block N | sha256_compress(H, block[N]) | starts from H after block N-1
Digest | H[0..7] → 32 big-endian bytes | output after last block
Change block 0 → ALL subsequent H differ → avalanche across digest
H[0] = a | ignores prior blocks | NOT SHA-256
H[1] = b | last block wins only | trivially invertible
Every independent call | same result | no chaining
H[0] += a | mod 2³² | prior state preserved
Each block contributes | to ALL future H values | collision resistant

text.tspan: /* H is MODIFIED in place each iteration */
/* Block i+1 starts from H after block i */
